briefdescription.para: Convert 16-bit integer from little-endian to host endianness.

parameterdescription.para: 16-bit integer in little-endian format.

briefdescription.para: Convert 16-bit integer from host endianness to little-endian.

parameterdescription.para: 16-bit integer in host endianness.

briefdescription.para: Convert 24-bit integer from little-endian to host endianness.

parameterdescription.para: 24-bit integer in little-endian format.

briefdescription.para: Convert 24-bit integer from host endianness to little-endian.

parameterdescription.para: 24-bit integer in host endianness.

briefdescription.para: Convert 32-bit integer from little-endian to host endianness.

parameterdescription.para: 32-bit integer in little-endian format.

briefdescription.para: Convert 32-bit integer from host endianness to little-endian.

parameterdescription.para: 32-bit integer in host endianness.

briefdescription.para: Convert 48-bit integer from little-endian to host endianness.

parameterdescription.para: 48-bit integer in little-endian format.

briefdescription.para: Convert 48-bit integer from host endianness to little-endian.

parameterdescription.para: 48-bit integer in host endianness.

briefdescription.para: Convert 16-bit integer from big-endian to host endianness.

parameterdescription.para: 16-bit integer in big-endian format.

briefdescription.para: Convert 16-bit integer from host endianness to big-endian.

parameterdescription.para: 16-bit integer in host endianness.

briefdescription.para: Convert 24-bit integer from big-endian to host endianness.

parameterdescription.para: 24-bit integer in big-endian format.

briefdescription.para: Convert 24-bit integer from host endianness to big-endian.

parameterdescription.para: 24-bit integer in host endianness.

briefdescription.para: Convert 32-bit integer from big-endian to host endianness.

parameterdescription.para: 32-bit integer in big-endian format.

briefdescription.para: Convert 32-bit integer from host endianness to big-endian.

parameterdescription.para: 32-bit integer in host endianness.

briefdescription.para: Convert 48-bit integer from big-endian to host endianness.

parameterdescription.para: 48-bit integer in big-endian format.

briefdescription.para: Convert 48-bit integer from host endianness to big-endian.

parameterdescription.para: 48-bit integer in host endianness.

briefdescription.para: Convert 16-bit unsigned integer to byte array.

detaileddescription.para: Byte order aware macro to treat an unsigned integer as an array, rather than an integer literal. For example, 0x0123 would be converted to {0x01, 0x23} for big endian machines, and {0x23, 0x01} for little endian machines.

parameterdescription.para: 16-bit unsigned integer.

briefdescription.para: Convert 32-bit unsigned integer to byte array.

detaileddescription.para: Byte order aware macro to treat an unsigned integer as an array, rather than an integer literal. For example, 0x01234567 would be converted to {0x01, 0x23, 0x45, 0x67} for big endian machines, and {0x67, 0x45, 0x23, 0x01} for little endian machines.

parameterdescription.para: 32-bit unsigned integer.

briefdescription.para: Convert 64-bit unsigned integer to byte array.

detaileddescription.para: Byte order aware macro to treat an unsigned integer as an array, rather than an integer literal. For example, 0x0123456789abcdef would be converted to {0x01, 0x23, 0x45, 0x67, 0x89, 0xab, 0xcd, 0xef} for big endian machines, and {0xef, 0xcd, 0xab, 0x89, 0x67, 0x45, 0x23, 0x01} for little endian machines.

parameterdescription.para: 64-bit unsigned integer.

briefdescription.para: Put a 16-bit integer as big-endian to arbitrary location.

detaileddescription.para: Put a 16-bit integer, originally in host endianness, to a potentially unaligned memory location in big-endian format.

parameterdescription.para: 16-bit integer in host endianness.
Destination memory address to store the result.

briefdescription.para: Put a 24-bit integer as big-endian to arbitrary location.

detaileddescription.para: Put a 24-bit integer, originally in host endianness, to a potentially unaligned memory location in big-endian format.

parameterdescription.para: 24-bit integer in host endianness.
Destination memory address to store the result.

briefdescription.para: Put a 32-bit integer as big-endian to arbitrary location.

detaileddescription.para: Put a 32-bit integer, originally in host endianness, to a potentially unaligned memory location in big-endian format.

parameterdescription.para: 32-bit integer in host endianness.
Destination memory address to store the result.

briefdescription.para: Put a 40-bit integer as big-endian to arbitrary location.

detaileddescription.para: Put a 40-bit integer, originally in host endianness, to a potentially unaligned memory location in big-endian format.

parameterdescription.para: 40-bit integer in host endianness.
Destination memory address to store the result.

briefdescription.para: Put a 48-bit integer as big-endian to arbitrary location.

detaileddescription.para: Put a 48-bit integer, originally in host endianness, to a potentially unaligned memory location in big-endian format.

parameterdescription.para: 48-bit integer in host endianness.
Destination memory address to store the result.

briefdescription.para: Put a 64-bit integer as big-endian to arbitrary location.

detaileddescription.para: Put a 64-bit integer, originally in host endianness, to a potentially unaligned memory location in big-endian format.

parameterdescription.para: 64-bit integer in host endianness.
Destination memory address to store the result.

briefdescription.para: Put a 16-bit integer as little-endian to arbitrary location.

detaileddescription.para: Put a 16-bit integer, originally in host endianness, to a potentially unaligned memory location in little-endian format.

parameterdescription.para: 16-bit integer in host endianness.
Destination memory address to store the result.

briefdescription.para: Put a 24-bit integer as little-endian to arbitrary location.

detaileddescription.para: Put a 24-bit integer, originally in host endianness, to a potentially unaligned memory location in little-endian format.

parameterdescription.para: 24-bit integer in host endianness.
Destination memory address to store the result.

briefdescription.para: Put a 32-bit integer as little-endian to arbitrary location.

detaileddescription.para: Put a 32-bit integer, originally in host endianness, to a potentially unaligned memory location in little-endian format.

parameterdescription.para: 32-bit integer in host endianness.
Destination memory address to store the result.

briefdescription.para: Put a 40-bit integer as little-endian to arbitrary location.

detaileddescription.para: Put a 40-bit integer, originally in host endianness, to a potentially unaligned memory location in little-endian format.

parameterdescription.para: 40-bit integer in host endianness.
Destination memory address to store the result.

briefdescription.para: Put a 48-bit integer as little-endian to arbitrary location.

detaileddescription.para: Put a 48-bit integer, originally in host endianness, to a potentially unaligned memory location in little-endian format.

parameterdescription.para: 48-bit integer in host endianness.
Destination memory address to store the result.

briefdescription.para: Put a 64-bit integer as little-endian to arbitrary location.

detaileddescription.para: Put a 64-bit integer, originally in host endianness, to a potentially unaligned memory location in little-endian format.

parameterdescription.para: 64-bit integer in host endianness.
Destination memory address to store the result.

briefdescription.para: Get a 16-bit integer stored in big-endian format.

detaileddescription.para: Get a 16-bit integer, stored in big-endian format in a potentially unaligned memory location, and convert it to the host endianness.

parameterdescription.para: Location of the big-endian 16-bit integer to get.

briefdescription.para: Get a 24-bit integer stored in big-endian format.

detaileddescription.para: Get a 24-bit integer, stored in big-endian format in a potentially unaligned memory location, and convert it to the host endianness.

parameterdescription.para: Location of the big-endian 24-bit integer to get.

briefdescription.para: Get a 32-bit integer stored in big-endian format.

detaileddescription.para: Get a 32-bit integer, stored in big-endian format in a potentially unaligned memory location, and convert it to the host endianness.

parameterdescription.para: Location of the big-endian 32-bit integer to get.

briefdescription.para: Get a 40-bit integer stored in big-endian format.

detaileddescription.para: Get a 40-bit integer, stored in big-endian format in a potentially unaligned memory location, and convert it to the host endianness.

parameterdescription.para: Location of the big-endian 40-bit integer to get.

briefdescription.para: Get a 48-bit integer stored in big-endian format.

detaileddescription.para: Get a 48-bit integer, stored in big-endian format in a potentially unaligned memory location, and convert it to the host endianness.

parameterdescription.para: Location of the big-endian 48-bit integer to get.

briefdescription.para: Get a 64-bit integer stored in big-endian format.

detaileddescription.para: Get a 64-bit integer, stored in big-endian format in a potentially unaligned memory location, and convert it to the host endianness.

parameterdescription.para: Location of the big-endian 64-bit integer to get.

briefdescription.para: Get a 16-bit integer stored in little-endian format.

detaileddescription.para: Get a 16-bit integer, stored in little-endian format in a potentially unaligned memory location, and convert it to the host endianness.

parameterdescription.para: Location of the little-endian 16-bit integer to get.

briefdescription.para: Get a 24-bit integer stored in little-endian format.

detaileddescription.para: Get a 24-bit integer, stored in little-endian format in a potentially unaligned memory location, and convert it to the host endianness.

parameterdescription.para: Location of the little-endian 24-bit integer to get.

briefdescription.para: Get a 32-bit integer stored in little-endian format.

detaileddescription.para: Get a 32-bit integer, stored in little-endian format in a potentially unaligned memory location, and convert it to the host endianness.

parameterdescription.para: Location of the little-endian 32-bit integer to get.

briefdescription.para: Get a 40-bit integer stored in little-endian format.

detaileddescription.para: Get a 40-bit integer, stored in little-endian format in a potentially unaligned memory location, and convert it to the host endianness.

parameterdescription.para: Location of the little-endian 40-bit integer to get.

briefdescription.para: Get a 48-bit integer stored in little-endian format.

detaileddescription.para: Get a 48-bit integer, stored in little-endian format in a potentially unaligned memory location, and convert it to the host endianness.

parameterdescription.para: Location of the little-endian 48-bit integer to get.

briefdescription.para: Get a 64-bit integer stored in little-endian format.

detaileddescription.para: Get a 64-bit integer, stored in little-endian format in a potentially unaligned memory location, and convert it to the host endianness.

parameterdescription.para: Location of the little-endian 64-bit integer to get.

briefdescription.para: Swap one buffer content into another.

detaileddescription.para: Copy the content of src buffer into dst buffer in reversed order, i.e.: src[n] will be put in dst[end-n] Where n is an index and 'end' the last index in both arrays. The 2 memory pointers must be pointing to different areas, and have a minimum size of given length.

parameterdescription.para: A valid pointer on a memory area where to copy the data in
A valid pointer on a memory area where to copy the data from
Size of both dst and src memory areas

briefdescription.para: Swap buffer content.

detaileddescription.para: In-place memory swap, where final content will be reversed. I.e.: buf[n] will be put in buf[end-n] Where n is an index and 'end' the last index of buf.

parameterdescription.para: A valid pointer on a memory area to swap
Size of buf memory area

briefdescription.para: Convert buffer from little-endian to host endianness.

parameterdescription.para: A valid pointer on a memory area to convert from little-endian to host endianness.
Size of buf memory area

briefdescription.para: Convert buffer from host endianness to little-endian.

parameterdescription.para: A valid pointer on a memory area to convert from host endianness to little-endian.
Size of buf memory area

briefdescription.para: Convert buffer from big-endian to host endianness.

parameterdescription.para: A valid pointer on a memory area to convert from big-endian to host endianness.
Size of buf memory area

briefdescription.para: Convert buffer from host endianness to big-endian.

parameterdescription.para: A valid pointer on a memory area to convert from host endianness to big-endian.
Size of buf memory area

briefdescription.para: Put a buffer as little-endian to arbitrary location.

detaileddescription.para: Put a buffer originally in host endianness, to a potentially unaligned memory location in little-endian format.

parameterdescription.para: A valid pointer on a memory area where to copy the data in
A valid pointer on a memory area where to copy the data from
Size of both dst and src memory areas

briefdescription.para: Put a buffer as big-endian to arbitrary location.

detaileddescription.para: Put a buffer originally in host endianness, to a potentially unaligned memory location in big-endian format.

parameterdescription.para: A valid pointer on a memory area where to copy the data in
A valid pointer on a memory area where to copy the data from
Size of both dst and src memory areas

briefdescription.para: Get a buffer stored in little-endian format.

detaileddescription.para: Get a buffer, stored in little-endian format in a potentially unaligned memory location, and convert it to the host endianness.

parameterdescription.para: A valid pointer on a memory area where to copy the data in
A valid pointer on a memory area where to copy the data from
Size of both dst and src memory areas

briefdescription.para: Get a buffer stored in big-endian format.

detaileddescription.para: Get a buffer, stored in big-endian format in a potentially unaligned memory location, and convert it to the host endianness.

parameterdescription.para: A valid pointer on a memory area where to copy the data in
A valid pointer on a memory area where to copy the data from
Size of both dst and src memory areas

briefdescription.para: Byte order helpers.
